artifact_summary: Grid of ten modulating valve symbols from Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A showing gate and butterfly valves with open percentages.
artifact_blurb: This Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A page presents a comprehensive grid of ten distinct modulating valve symbols, specifically detailing gate and butterfly valve configurations annotated with precise open percentages and corresponding target operational states.
